parameters:
Carpenter Orc: This is your land. If you have 50
pieces of lumber, we can start building a house!

\c[2]＊Note... This is one of the conditions for
pregnancy. If you don't want to proceed to a pregnancy
state, it's better to postpone this. \c[0] ＊It's
recommended to prepare a separate save file before
proceeding.

Carpenter Orc: Alright! I'll build you a splendid
house!

Carpenter Orc: Whenever you feel like building, just
let me know! Don't forget about the lumber, okay?
Carpenter Orc: Ooh! Leave the rest to me!

(＊One of the pregnancy conditions has been met. A
house will be built when the pregnancy event occurs.)
